expectations.text: Agent invokes wiki-query at least once
expectations.evidence: Full retrieval pipeline: hot.md pre-check, index pass, 3 full page reads (Navigation 3 CMP concept, official CMP reference, John O'Reilly source), grep pass on MVI Pattern page. 5 pages total.

expectations.text: Agent uses routing-table terms (not freeform query)
expectations.evidence: Query 'Navigation 3 CMP NavDisplay back stack type-safe SavedStateConfiguration' matches routing table entry verbatim.

expectations.text: Answer cites or paraphrases wiki content (not generic)
expectations.evidence: Cites 'Navigation 3 CMP', 'web-kotlinlang-org-multiplatform-compose-navigation-3', 'source-navigation3-cmp-johnoreilly', 'MVI Pattern in Compose' by name. Incorporates alpha05 dependency coordinates, SavedStateConfiguration polymorphic serializer requirement, and wiki-documented open question on MVI+Nav3 integration.

expectations.text: Answer addresses the specific symptom in the prompt
expectations.evidence: Covers both requirements: type-safe routes (NavKey sealed interface with @Serializable data class WorkoutDetail) and process-death survival (SavedStateConfiguration with polymorphic serializers, not the JVM-only reflection overload).
